name: The Triad
description: You have the use of one Triad power.

name: Amphibious
description: You can breathe water as well as air. You can swim at full speed.

name: Armored Skin
description: Gain +1 to your AC when not wearing armor.

name: Covert Communication
description: You can communicate secretly with others of your species or those who understand this communication.

name: Longsight
description: You get a +1 bonus to ranged attack and damage rolls.

name: Hyperacute Senses
description: You can't be surprised by enemies or events.

name: Powerful
description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with melee weapons.

name: Natural Weapon
description: You have a natural weapon that deals 1d6 damage. You are proficient with it.

name: Flight
description: You can fly and/or walk.

name: Sneaky
description: You have advantage when trying to be deceptive.

name: Tracking Sense
description: Once per day, pick a target to be your quarry. You have advantage on all checks to track your quarry.

name: Adapted for Heat
description: Can survive in hot environments. Half damage from fire or heat.

name: Adapted for Cold
description: Can survive in cold environments. Half damage from ice or cold.

name: Technical Knack
description: You get a +1 bonus when working with technology and machines.

name: Natural Connection
description: You get a +1 bonus when working with plants and animals.

name: Radiation Resistant
description: Can survive in radioactive environments. Half damage from radiation or electricity.

name: Filtration
description: Can survive in toxic environments. Half damage from poison.

name: Natural Climber
description: Full speed for climbing. Reduce climbing DC by one category.

name: Extra Arms
description: Can take one extra non-attack action per turn. Increase gear slots by 2.

name: Extra Legs
description: Can move up to Near twice in a turn in addition to their action. DC to be tripped increased by one category

name: Ambitious
description: You gain one additional Archetype talent roll at 1st level.
